description: An SEM manager reviews a search query report and finds irrelevant searches triggering ads. They need to add negative keywords to prevent this.

nodes.task_description: Pull the search query report for a specific campaign for the last 30 days.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves the list of actual search terms that triggered ads.
Agent compiles a list of terms that indicate non-commercial intent.

nodes.task_description: Add the identified irrelevant terms to the campaign's negative keyword list.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully updates the negative keyword list, improving campaign efficiency.
